title: Where is My Bus Filling

contextualAttributes.comment: Animation effect on spheres, like humans that are standing in fast-forward.

visualElements.comment: There is a metaphor of a crowd.

visualChannels.comment: The difference in count of the population when the bus passes.

visualChannels.comment: The change in size shows the amount of people that got in or out of the bus.
